title: inula scaberrima
intro: Inula scaberrima, also known as the prickly elecampane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Inula scaberrima include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Inula scaberrima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
